iam.addusertogroup.CfnAbout: Adds the specified user to the specified group.

iam.addusertogroup.GroupName.Description: The name of the group to update.  This parameter allows (through its [regex pattern](http://wikipedia.org/wiki/regex)) a string of characters consisting of upper and lowercase alphanumeric characters with no spaces. You can also include any of the following characters: _+=,.@-

iam.addusertogroup.Users.Description: A list of the names of the users that you want to add to the group.
